name: holy-grail
description: Fire-and-forget upgrade-anything skill. Say 'upgrade X', answer one focus question, then it runs unattended: writes the brief, plans it, builds it with subagents, adds net-new features, tests, and reviews with an expert panel plus an adversarial second opinion, improving over a main pass and several rounds. Ends at a PR (never auto-merges) and self-learns every run. Works on code, UI, copy, and strategy. Self-contained with built-in fallbacks; uses superpowers/codex/gstack when present.
